title: Xtra Smoky American Beef Hash
description: A buttery and shaggy American dish featuring coriander and smoke, served in a banana leaf, perfect for curing hangovers. This low-sodium-friendly recipe is a delicious and satisfying meal.
instructions: In a large skillet, cook the ground beef over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the diced onion to the skillet and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Stir in the ground coriander, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Remove the skillet from the heat and stir in the butter until it is melted and the mixture is well combined.
Lay a banana leaf flat on a work surface and spoon about 1/2 cup of the beef mixture onto the center of the leaf.
Fold the sides of the leaf over the filling and roll the leaf into a tight cylinder, repeating with the remaining beef mixture and banana leaves.
Place the banana leaf rolls on a baking sheet and bake for 15 minutes, or until the leaves are slightly charred and the filling is hot and steamy.
Serve the Xtra Smoky American Beef Hash hot, straight from the banana leaf.
